title: Brazilian-Style Chicken Skewers
description: Grilled chicken skewers marinated in a smoky, sweet, and tangy Brazilian-inspired sauce. Perfect for a quick and easy dinner.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together smoky roasted garlic sauce, brazilian seasoning, olive oil, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Serve the skewers hot with lemon wedges on the side, if desired.
